justified_non_text_logic: cli.py: display-cell spinner/status height calculation preserves terminal layout for localized CJK text; no command/control flow changes
hermes_cli/skin_engine.py: data-only YAML lookup for terminal command/skin/tip/ui catalogs
gateway/platforms/discord.py: Discord visible labels/descriptions/replies lookup; command names, choice values and custom IDs remain protocol-stable
source_policy: minimal display-layer localization hooks for fixed visible terminal and Discord text; no Web UI, no Telegram platform patch, no model-facing prompt changes
